title: lepidium iberis
intro: Lepidium iberis, also known as Iberian cress or pepperwort, is a biennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of isothiocyanates and other compounds. The health benefits of Lepidium iberis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Lepidium iberis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, allowing for various applications in herbal medicine.
